title: 211INFO SNAP AND FOOD ACCESS - 211info
text: 211INFO 211INFO SNAP AND FOOD ACCESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The 211info SNAP and Food Access program provides specialized information, referral, advocacy, follow-up services, and extra guidance to individuals and family members who would like to access the SNAP program, have a question or issue with their current SNAP case, and/or need extra guidance accessing food resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone 211 Text Short Code 898211 Text your zip code Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or text your zip code for information. Voicemail option available if calling after-hours or if specialist is unavailable. FEES: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Advocacy * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Advocacy * Hunger/Food Issues Community Supported Agriculture Emergency Food Clearinghouses Food Cooperatives Food Stamps/SNAP Food Stamps/SNAP * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Food Stamps/SNAP * Older Adults Food Vouchers Grocery Ordering/Delivery Special Diet Food Specialized Information and Referral * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Specialized Information and Referral * Hunger/Food Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - 211INFO DCM LINE DISASTER SERVICES - GORGE CITIZEN ALERT PROGRAM DISASTER SERVICES - SEVERE WINTER WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES DISASTER SERVICES - WINTER AND SEVERE WEATHER INFORMATION SERVICES MULTNOMAH COUNTY HOUSING/SHELTER - COORDINATED ENTRY FOR FAMILIES MULTNOMAH COUNTY HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY EVICTION PREVENTION PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - MULTNOMAH COUNTY FAMILY SHELTER WAITLIST INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO CHILD CARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO COORDINATION CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO ICE IMPACT SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO INFORMATION AND REFERRAL INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO OUTREACH AND MATERIALS REQUESTS INFORMATION SERVICES - 211INFO RESOURCE DEPARTMENT INFORMATION SERVICES - OREGON HIV/STD HOTLINE MONEY MANAGEMENT - 211INFO FINANCIAL WELLNESS UTILITIES - 211INFO UTILITY ASSISTANCE UPDATES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
